resources.string: grpc
WorkView: next 3 upcoming jobs

Getting started

- Log in and you land on the Home menu.
- Key areas:
 - Work View
 - Contracts
 - Jobs
 - Reports
 - Quotes
 - ERA
 - Messaging
 - Notifications

Tip
- Use Notifications to review assigned work and updates.

Reports

- Create reports from Home, Jobs, or Contracts.
- Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage under ReportsYY/Month/.
- Use View Reports to browse and share PDFs.

Contracts

- Add and service customer contracts.
- Mark visits done to keep Last/Next Visit correct.

Work View + Jobs

- Use Work View to schedule your day and mark work complete.
- Use Jobs to manage assigned work items.

Custom times and drag-and-drop
- Create with custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.
Commission (Leads)\n\n- Use Leads to track invoices/commission where enabled.

Notifications + Messaging

- Notifications are in-app only.
- Use Messaging for 1:1 and group chat.

Support

- If something looks wrong, log out/in and retry.
- Contact James for support.

Getting started (James)

- You have full access to all areas.
- James-only features:
 - Global Search (search across Jobs/Contracts/Leads/Reports)
 - Location Finder (last known technician locations)

Daily use
- Check Notifications first.
- Use Work View to plan the day.
- Use Contracts/Jobs to manage assignment + completion.

Tip
- Use the dropdown at the top of this help screen to preview Ian/Dean help text.

Reports (James)

Create
- Create reports from Home, Contracts, or Jobs.
- Capture signatures/photos when needed.

Upload
- Upload to Firebase Storage using:
 - ReportsYY/Month/<PDF>

Manage
- View, share, rename, delete local reports.
- If deleting local reports, confirm upload status first (best practice).

Contracts (James)

Assign
- Contracts → Add Contract.
- Use Assign-to dropdown (James / Dean / Ian).
- The assigned technician receives an in-app notification.

Service
- Mark as Done updates last/next visit.

Admin
- You can edit/delete contracts.

Work View + Jobs (James)

Work View
- Schedule jobs/contracts and mark complete.
- Reminders are scheduled ~30 minutes before scheduled events.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → “Custom time…” → enter start and end (e.g. 08:30 and 15:00).
- Edit time: Tap event → Edit Time → change start/end and save.
- Move event: Long-press in daily view, drag to another slot, release; duration is kept.

Job Work
- Use technician dropdown when creating jobs to avoid typos.
- Assigned tech gets an in-app notification.

Admin
- You can delete Job Work and Management Jobs.

Commission (Leads) (James)

- Generate Lead / View Leads.
- Track invoice status and commission.
- Lead updates can notify the assigned technician.

Notifications + Messaging (James)

- Notifications are in-app only.
- Use Notifications to audit assignments/updates.
- Messaging supports 1:1 + group chat.

Support (James)

- If staff report missing items, confirm assignment/owner is correct.
- Confirm correct Storage year folder was used when uploading reports.
- If a user can’t delete something, that is expected for Dean.

Getting started (Ian)

- You have admin/oversight access.

Daily use
- Check Notifications.
- Use Work View to schedule and manage upcoming work.
- Use Contracts/Jobs to assign work and keep schedules accurate.

Reports (Ian)

- Create reports from Contracts/Jobs.
- Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage:
 - ReportsYY/Month/<PDF>
- Use View Reports to share with customers/office.

Contracts (Ian)

Assign
- Contracts → Add Contract.
- Use Assign-to dropdown (James / Dean / Ian).
- Assigned technician receives an in-app notification.

Admin
- You can edit/delete contracts.

Tip
- If a contract isn’t showing for someone, confirm it was added to the correct technician’s Contracts list.

Work View + Jobs (Ian)

Work View
- Schedule events and mark complete.
- Reminders are scheduled ~30 minutes before jobs/contracts.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → “Custom time…” → enter start and end (e.g. 08:30 and 15:00).
- Edit time: Tap event → Edit Time → change start/end and save.
- Move event: Long-press in daily view, drag to another slot, release; duration is kept.

Job Work
- Create jobs and choose technician from dropdown.
- Assigned tech receives an in-app notification.

Admin
- You can delete jobs and management jobs.

Commission (Leads) (Ian)

- Use View Leads for oversight.
- Updating materials/commission can notify the assigned technician.

Notifications + Messaging (Ian)

- Notifications are in-app only.
- Use Notifications to review what was assigned/updated.
- Messaging supports 1:1 and group chat.

Support (Ian)

- If Dean needs a delete, they must contact admin.
- For report issues: confirm correct year folder + upload occurred.

Getting started (Dean)

- Your main tools are Work View, Jobs, Contracts, and Reports.

Important restrictions
- You cannot delete contracts or jobs.
- If you try, you’ll see:
 - “To delete a contract get in touch with Ian or Kristine.”
 - “To delete a job get in touch with Ian or Kristine.”

Reports (Dean)

Create
- Create reports from Jobs or Contracts.

Upload first
- Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage before deleting local copies:
 - ReportsYY/Month/<PDF>

Delete (local)
- You can delete local reports, but you will be asked:
 - “Have you added/uploaded these report(s) to Firebase before deleting?”

Contracts (Dean)

- You can add contracts to your own list.
- Use Mark as Done to keep last/next visit accurate.

Delete
- You cannot delete contracts. Contact Ian or Kristine if something needs removing.

Work View + Jobs (Dean)

Work View
- Check your daily schedule and upcoming events.
- Mark events complete when finished.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → “Custom time…” → enter start and end (e.g. 08:30 and 15:00).
- Edit time: Tap event → Edit Time → change start/end and save.
- Move event: Long-press in daily view, drag to another slot, release; duration is kept.

Jobs
- Complete assigned jobs, add address if needed, and create a report.

Delete
- You cannot delete jobs. Contact Ian or Kristine if something needs removing.

Commission (Leads) (Dean)

- Use Leads to view items assigned to you (where enabled).
- If a lead is updated (materials/commission/paid), you may receive a notification.

Notifications + Messaging (Dean)

- Notifications are in-app only.
- Use Notifications to see new assignments/updates.
- Use Messaging for 1:1 and group chat.

Support (Dean)

- If something needs deleting or correcting in jobs/contracts, contact Ian or Kristine.
- If reports are missing, confirm you uploaded to the correct year folder.

Getting started (Kristine)

- You have admin/office access for oversight and assignments.

Daily use
- Check Notifications.
- Use Jobs/Contracts/Leads to keep office tracking up to date.

Reports (Kristine)

- Reports are uploaded to Firebase Storage under ReportsYY/Month/.
- Use View Reports to review/share PDFs.
- If a report isn’t visible, verify the year/month folder.

Contracts (Kristine)

Assign
- Contracts → Add Contract.
- Use Assign-to dropdown (James / Dean / Ian).
- Assigned technician receives an in-app notification.

Admin
- You can edit/delete contracts.

Work View + Jobs (Kristine)

Work View
- Use Work View for oversight of scheduling.
- Custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → “Custom time…” → enter start and end (e.g. 08:30 and 15:00).
- Edit time: Tap event → Edit Time → change start/end and save.
- Move event: Long-press in daily view, drag to another slot, release; duration is kept.

Jobs
- Create jobs and assign technician via dropdown.
- You can delete jobs if needed.

Commission (Leads) (Kristine)

- Use Leads for invoice/commission tracking.
- Updating a lead can notify the assigned technician.

Notifications + Messaging (Kristine)

- Notifications are in-app only.
- Use Notifications for oversight.
- Use Messaging for staff communication.

Support (Kristine)

- If Dean needs deletes/major corrections, handle as admin.
- For missing reports, confirm the correct Storage folder (ReportsYY/Month).

Getting started

- Log in and you land on the Home menu.
- Key areas:
 - Work View
 - Contracts
 - Jobs
 - Reports
 - Quotes
 - ERA
 - Messaging
 - Notifications

Tip
- Use Notifications to review assigned work and updates.

Reports

- Create reports from Home, Jobs, or Contracts.
- Upload PDFs to Firebase Storage under ReportsYY/Month/.
- Use View Reports to browse and share PDFs.

Contracts

- Add and service customer contracts.
- Mark visits done to keep Last/Next Visit correct.

Work View + Jobs

- Use Work View to schedule your day and mark work complete.
- Use Jobs to manage assigned work items.

Custom times and drag-and-drop
- Create with custom duration: Add Job/Contract/Follow-up → when the time dialog appears choose “Custom time…”, enter start (e.g. 08:30) and end (e.g. 15:00).
- Change event time: Tap event → Edit Time → set start/end and save.
- Move event: In daily view, long-press an event, drag to another time slot and release; start moves to that slot, duration is kept.
Commission (Leads)\n\n- Use Leads to track invoices/commission where enabled.

Notifications + Messaging

- Notifications are in-app only.
- Use Messaging for 1:1 and group chat.

Support

- If something looks wrong, log out/in and retry.
- Contact James for support.

AI Chat uses keys stored in Firestore (collection AI-Chat, document AI-API). Only James (user 001) can update them.

• KEY = Hugging Face token. Get it at: https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens (create a token with Inference permissions). Used with Hugging Face Router.

• key-grog = Groq API key. Get it at: https://console.groq.com (sign in, go to API Keys, create a key). Used with Groq.

The app uses Groq if key-grog is set; otherwise it uses Hugging Face if KEY is set. Set at least one.

To update in the app:
1. Open AI Chat
2. Tap the settings (gear) icon top-right
3. Choose "Update Hugging Face Key" or "Update Groq Key"
4. Enter the new key and tap Update

The keys are stored in Firestore only; the app never displays them.
